Name: Groupe iliad
Description:
Created in the early 1990s, the iliad Group is the inventor of the world’s first triple-play box and has grown into a major European telecoms player, standing out for its innovative, straightforward and attractive offerings. 

The Group is the parent of Free in France, iliad in Italy and Play in Poland, has over 16,500 employees serving 45.3 million subscribers, and generated €7.6 billion in pro forma revenues in 2021. 

In France, the Group is an integrated Fixed and Mobile Ultra-Fast Broadband operator and had over 21.2 million retail subscribers at September 30, 2022. On March 23, 2021, the iliad Group launched its BtoB business in France under the Free Pro brand.

In Italy – where the Group made its entry in 2018 under the iliad brand, becoming the country’s fourth mobile operator – it had over 9.4 million subscribers at end-September 2022. 

With the acquisition of Polish mobile operator Play in November 2020, which currently has 14 million subscribers, the iliad Group became Europe’s sixth-largest mobile operator by number of subscribers.

Name: ACMOSS - Agence des communications mobiles opérationnelles de sécurité et de secours
Description:
L’agence des communications mobiles opérationnelles de sécurité et de secours (ACMOSS) est un établissement public national à caractère administratif, sous la tutelle du ministre de l’Intérieur. 

Créée par décret le 30 mars 2023, l’ACMOSS est chargée de la mise en œuvre et de l’opération du Réseau Radio du Futur (RRF). 

Le RRF est un réseau de télécommunications numérique ayant vocation à remplacer les réseaux de télécommunications utilisés par les services publics français (polices nationale et municipales, gendarmerie, pompiers, SAMU, douaniers, administrations pénitentiaires, Préfectures ...) à partir d'avril 2025.

Ainsi, le RRF dotera les acteurs de la sécurité et du secours français d’un système de communication commun, prioritaire, sécurisé et haut débit bénéficiant des meilleures technologies numériques et d’un haut niveau de résilience en cas de crise.

L'ACMOSS est présente sur X/Twitter : @ACMOSS_FR

Name: Open Broadband LLC
Description:
Open Broadband is an Internet Service Provider, offering a hybrid Fiber and Wireless last-mile broadband service to underserved areas.  We also offer managed Wi-Fi zones for downtowns, parks, campuses, and apartments.  Fast 50 winner 2021, 2022, 2023, InnoVision winner 2023, Blue Diamond Award 2023.

Headquartered just outside Charlotte, NC, we are currently engaged with communities throughout the Carolinas, Virginia, and Florida. We've been ranked in the Charlotte Business Journal Fast 50 growing company list in 2021, 2022, and 2023

We specialize in working with a city/county to form a public-private partnership (PPP) to leverage existing assets such as towers, street lights, and existing fiber. We customize each PPP in one of the following ways:
1.	Open Broadband investment, public facilitation
2.	Open Broadband execution, public funding
3.	Shared investment and risk

Open Broadband offers a unique solution consisting of:
•	Highly experienced data and telecom experts, who have been responsible for community networks, and know how to make them work.
•	Experience in working with local governments.
•	Open and flexible in solutions. We are not tied down to specific product sets.
•	Local service, familiar with all aspects of how to deploy broadband.
•	Open to new public-private partnership models.
•	Exceptional communications skills: being able to speak at the level of all stakeholders.

We are Open to new ideas and new models to provide high-speed broadband services to local communities and help close the digital divide. Large telecom companies are investing in large cities, but they often ignore smaller communities and rural areas. Open Broadband helps fill in the gaps, assisting communities in obtaining greater broadband solutions.

Contact us at info@openbb.net.

Name: Breitbandversorgung Deutschland GmbH
Description: Die BBV Deutschland mit Sitz in Dreieich (Rhein-Main-Gebiet) konzentriert sich als Betreiber von Breitband-Netzen und -Diensten seit Jahren auf den komplett eigenwirtschaftlichen, förderungsfreien Glasfaserausbau in ländlichen Gebieten. Beim Ausbau kooperiert die BBV mit Landkreisen, Kommunen und Stadtwerken. Dabei bietet das Unternehmen alle Projektschritte aus einer Hand: von der Vermarktung, über die Planung und den Ausbau bis hin zum Netzbetrieb und Kundendienst. Den Kunden werden je nach Region unter der Marke toni oder BBV über die Glasfaser symmetrische Internetdienste mit bis zu 1 Gbit/s sowie Telefonie- und TV-Dienste bereitgestellt. Die Finanzierung der Projekte läuft in enger Zusammenarbeit mit Finanzpartnern und namhaften Infrastrukturfonds. Der Einstieg des Investors Infracapital mündete in die Infrafibre Germany, welche die deutschen Glasfaseraktivitäten von Infracapital unter einem Dach bündelt.

Name: PROTELKO Fundacja Wspierania Nowych Technologii Telekomunikacyjnych
Description: Korzenie Fundacji sięgają początku lat 90. ubiegłego stulecia, okresu w którym tworzyło się Ogólnopolskie Stowarzyszenie Operatorów Sieci Telewizji Kablowej z siedzibą w Zielonej Górze i w którym to procesie uczestniczyli nasi fundatorzy. Był to okres, w którym potrzeba zdobywania wiedzy i informacji o prowadzeniu takiej działalności była wręcz ogromna, a ówczesne polskie prawodawstwo nie znało pojęcia telewizji kablowej. Telekomunikacja, będąca obecnie branżą, w której mieści się historyczna już telewizja kablowa, kojarzyła się wówczas z powstałą w 1991 spółką Skarbu Państwa – Telekomunikacją Polską, która przez kilka kolejnych lat nie wykazywała większego zainteresowania „kablem” jak potocznie określano dostęp do programów TV tą drogą. Dało to asumpt do powstania kilkuset podmiotów gospodarczych świadczących tę działalność, na którą zapotrzebowanie społeczne było wówczas ogromne. Akronim TVK stał się powszechnym składnikiem nazw firm operatorskich i jest powszechnie znany jako wyróżnik branży.

Name: Jellyfish International Technologies Ltd
Description:
The Jellyfish Mobile Project seeks to revolutionize mobile security by utilizing Web3 and blockchain technologies to address vulnerabilities inherent in traditional mobile networks, like SIM-swap attacks and the insecurity of mobile numbers. This innovative solution allows users to replace traditional mobile numbers with user-generated, owned crypto wallet addresses, enhancing security, privacy, and user control over digital identity. 

Jellyfish Mobile’s cutting-edge features include passwordless and zero-click compatible login and secure authentication, offering users a seamless and secure experience, reducing risks associated with device changes, and SIM swaps. Their Wallet-On-SIM technology enables a cold wallet to run on a SIM card, isolated from the host device, providing secure offline storage for crypto assets. 

Moreover, the project offers enhanced accessibility to a range of Web3 services, from DeFi to NFTs and gaming platforms, making it a comprehensive solution to bridge the gap between blockchain technology and mobile telecom infrastructure. In essence, Jellyfish Mobile represents a convergence of decentralized technology and mobile connectivity, aiming to reshape the mobile communication landscape by putting security and user control at its core.

Name: Campus, Hofnetz & Events GmbH
Description:
UNSERE VISION
Unser Team verfolgt eine klare Vision: moderne und leistungsfähige Telekommunikation kundenorientiert zu gestalten – nicht nur heute, sondern auch in Zukunft. Herzstück bildet hierfür unsere hochmoderne Infrastruktur, die es uns ermöglicht Kunden in ganz Deutschland, der DACH-Region und darüber hinaus mit einer breiten Palette von Lösungen zu bedienen. Eine Besonderheit stellen hierbei unsere Premium- & Event-Standorte dar, wo wir Dienste und Bandbreiten mit bis zu 10Gbit/s innerhalb von Tagen oder sogar Stunden bereitstellen können.

Für Cloud-Lösungen sind wir bestens gerüstet und bieten Ihnen leistungsstarke Konnektivität zu den wichtigsten Rechenzentren der Welt, darunter AWS, Google und Azure.

UNSER VERSTÄNDNIS
Im Mittelpunkt unserer Bemühungen stehen dabei stets die Bedürfnisse unserer Kunden; so wird beispielsweise unsere Netzinfrastruktur nach den Anforderungen unserer Kunden erweitert. Unser Verständnis für Verantwortung ist darin begründet, Ihre Lösung nicht nur mit Ihnen zu entwickeln, sondern auch umzusetzen und den Betrieb zu jeder Zeit zu verantworten.

Dieses Verständnis bietet insbesondere die Möglichkeit neben den beiden Produktlinien „Campus“ und „Hofnetz“ auch individuelle Lösungen mit unseren Kunden zu entwickeln.

Name: easySim.global
Description:
easySim.global eSIM's are now available worldwide, so international travellers now have access to low cost smartphone data, wherever they may roam.

Although ideal for UK travellers to Europe and beyond, the easySim.global service is suitable for international users around the world travelling outside their home countries, as they face the same painful charges for "out-of-bundle" data roaming as UK mobile users. We cover over 150 countries worldwide, so easySim can save money for everyone travelling (almost) anywhere.

Likewise, Americans arriving in Austria; Aussies attending the Ashes; Indians interested in Iceland or Spaniards sightseeing Singapore could all save money on mobile data compared to their deals at home.

easySim.global was launched by Portsmouth telecoms entrepreneurs Richard Gwilliam and Jim Guest with the backing of Sir Stelios Haji-Ioannou, founder of easyJet and owner of the easyGroup.

As a member of the easy family of companies, we're committed to offering exceptional service and customer satisfaction. We put our customers first and great value is part of our DNA.

Hasta la fecha, hemos logrado reunir un equipo de más de 70 profesionales de nuestra región. Nuestros planes de futuro nos llevan a expandirnos por otros territorios limítrofes, como el Camp de Tarragona en 2021 y varias zonas de la provincia de Lleida en 2022. Siempre manteniendo nuestro compromiso con nuestras raíces locales y nuestra marca.  
Esta unión hace de E-Ports una empresa sólida, que no solo busca cubrir áreas con conexión a Internet, sino que también se esfuerza por mejorar la calidad y el compromiso con nuestros clientes.

Name: UBER ISP
Description:
UBER ISP'S SOLUTION WAN as a Service (WaaS) UBER ISP service platform leverages a diverse and virtualized infrastructure to create a high-availability Internet connectivity platform. The platform is designed to dynamically adapt to underlying service provider outages and temporary quality degradations, ensuring a seamless Internet service experience for its subscribers.

Diverse Infrastructure: UBER ISP employs a multi-carrier infrastructure strategy. This involves integrating various types of network connections, such as cable, fiber, satellite, and 5G, from multiple service providers. By not relying on a single provider or technology, UBER ISP enhances the overall resilience and redundancy of the network.

Resilient Virtualized High-Availability Platform: UBER ISP platform uses software-defined networking (SDN) to create a flexible, dynamic, and robust virtual environment.

Dynamic Reaction to Service Provider Outages: One of the key features of UBER ISP's platform is its ability to detect and respond to outages from underlying service providers. When an outage or degradation is detected in one service provider's network, the platform can automatically reroute traffic to alternative pathways, ensuring minimal disruption.

Handling Temporary Quality Degradations: Beyond complete outages, UBER ISP's platform is also sensitive to fluctuations in quality, such as latency spikes or bandwidth drops. The platform employs real-time performance monitoring and quality of service (QoS) metrics to assess the health of each network path. If degradation is detected, the system can dynamically adjust load balancing traffic or switch to a higher-quality connection.

Name: Lopez Home Networks
Description:
Lopez Home Networks, headquartered in Laingsburg, Michigan, is a global telecom firm with a widespread team. We play a role in global communication networks and offer data center access via worldwide internet exchanges.

Our commitment extends to the communities we serve, involving community programs, grants, employee benefits, events, and more. We aim to reinvest the funds from our customers back into their lives, enhancing our networks and overall quality.

Together, our dedicated team, like a family, aspires to transform the world, one connection, one home, one business, and one community at a time. By linking even the remotest corners of the globe through various means, we strive to make technology accessible to all.

Collaborating with telecom giants like AT&T, Everstream, and others, we pursue uninterrupted service and the fastest global networks. Rather than being a long-haul carrier, we focus on offering access points worldwide through our network of esteemed partners.

From data center to business services, and beyond, our mission is to assist, construct, and unite the underserved communities worldwide.

Name: Kinetic VoIP
Description:
Kinetic VoIP is a cloud communications provider delivering scalable, reliable, and custom-built telecom solutions to businesses across the United States and internationally. Our team brings more than 30 years of combined expertise in deploying advanced voice technologies for small and mid-sized businesses. Whether your company is navigating digital transformation or wants a more predictable phone bill, we make switching to modern communications easy, secure, and cost effective.

Our mission is simple: to revolutionize your business phone system using cloud-based solutions that work the way you work. From hosted PBX and cloud call centers to SIP trunking and backup internet, we provide everything needed to keep your team connected and productive wherever they are.

What sets Kinetic VoIP apart is our people and our process. We approach every client relationship with integrity and transparency. No jargon. No surprises. Just the right combination of technology, support, and service to help you scale smarter.

We believe customer experience should be as reliable as the systems we deploy. That is why our U.S. based support team is available 24 hours a day, seven days a week to answer questions, resolve issues, and ensure your communications run without interruption.

At Kinetic VoIP, your success is our top priority. Our solutions are built to grow with you and are backed by a team that understands the importance of true partnership. If you are ready to simplify, streamline, and strengthen your business communications, we are ready to help.

Name: CERF (Compagnie Européenne du Réseau & de la Fibre)
Description:
La Compagnie Européenne du Réseau & de la Fibre [Cerf] a été créée en 2018 par deux entrepreneurs spécialisées dans le monde de l’IT, qui ont porté (et portent toujours) avec succès de nombreux projets depuis 1995.

CERF est un opérateur réseau enregistré à l’ARCEP en tant que CERF (N° 21-05737).

Depuis sa création en 2018, CERF a tiré plus de 150 Km de Fibre noire, et ne cesse d’investir dans la construction de son réseau et le développement de solutions alternatives comme le satellite Très Haut Débit, ou l’internet 4/5 G.

Le haut niveau d’exigence de nos clients nous a conduit à mettre qualité et sécurité au coeur de nos solutions.

Ces exigences se retrouvent dans toutes nos offres, qu’il s’agisse de Fibre noire (FON) ou de Satellite « Très Haut débit », réseau sur lequel nous avons développé des solutions spécifiquement adaptées à la couverture des zones blanches.

Toutes nos solutions sont doublées d’un backup destiné à maintenir automatiquement connexion en cas de coupure du media principal.

• Ü𝗯𝗲𝗿𝘀𝗶𝗰𝗵𝘁𝗹𝗶𝗰𝗵𝗲 𝘂𝗻𝗱 𝘁𝗿𝗮𝗻𝘀𝗽𝗮𝗿𝗲𝗻𝘁𝗲 𝗧𝗮𝗿𝗶𝗳𝗲 ohne unnötige Komplexität
• 𝗭𝘂𝘃𝗲𝗿𝗹ä𝘀𝘀𝗶𝗴𝗲𝗿 𝗦𝗲𝗿𝘃𝗶𝗰𝗲 von der Bereitstellung bis zum laufenden Betrieb
• 𝗠𝗼𝗱𝗲𝗿𝗻𝘀𝘁𝗲 𝗡𝗲𝘁𝘇𝗶𝗻𝗳𝗿𝗮𝘀𝘁𝗿𝘂𝗸𝘁𝘂𝗿 für eine stabile und nachhaltige Internetversorgung

Wir sind überzeugt: Zugang zu gutem Internet ist ein zentraler Bestandteil digitaler Teilhabe. Deshalb arbeiten wir kontinuierlich daran, Glasfaser-Internet für immer mehr Haushalte verfügbar zu machen und die digitale Zukunft aktiv mitzugestalten.

点検・物流・測量・監視など各領域のお客様ニーズに応じたソリューションを構築して提供しています。

Name: ÚVT Internet s.r.o.
Description:
Vítejte na profilu společnosti ÚVT Internet s.r.o.

Nejsme jen další telekomunikační společnost. Jsme tým profesionálů, kteří se věnují poskytování kvalitních a spolehlivých služeb INTERNET, TELEVIZE a TELEFON. 

 Naše cesta začala v roce 1998. Časem jsme se organicky vyvinuli z IT servisní organizace do firmy, která je dnes jednou z předních poskytovatelů telekomunikačních služeb v regionu. Naše odhodlání a odvaha nás v roce 2001 přivedla k rozhodnutí začít budovat vlastní telekomunikační optickou síť ÚVT. Dnes je naše síť součástí každodenního života tisíců lidí a firem, kteří oceňují naše služby za jejich spolehlivost, dostupnost a kvalitu.

 Ideální klienty tvoří jak jednotlivci tak i firmy, kteří oceňují vysokou kvalitu, spolehlivost a nadstandardní zákaznický servis. 

 Naším cílem je spokojenost klientů, náš přístup je osobní, přičemž si dáváme vždy záležet na každém detailu.

 Věříme, že naše služby nejsou jen dalším produktem na trhu, ale skutečným přínosem pro naše klienty. Pokud hledáte kvalitní a spolehlivé telekomunikační služby, jsme tu pro vás.

Name: Qué tal Móvil
Description:
Qué tal Móvil nació del conocimiento profundo de lo que significa ser hispano en Estados Unidos. De las alegrías, el orgullo y también de los desafíos que compartimos como comunidad. Al ver que muchas compañías de telefonía no entienden realmente las necesidades de las familias hispanas e inmigrantes, decidimos crear una alternativa auténtica, cercana y hecha a nuestra medida.

Ofrecemos un servicio móvil transparente, accesible y confiable. Con atención personalizada y bilingüe que fortalece los lazos familiares, celebra nuestra cultura y simplifica el día a día. Nuestra misión es hacerte la vida más fácil, ayudarte a manejar mejor tu dinero y acompañarte en lo que pasa en tu comunidad.

Queremos ser ese aliado que entiende tu día a día y está conectado con tu cultura.

——

Qué Tal Móvil was born from a deep understanding of the Hispanic experience in the U.S.—the joy, pride, and unique challenges our communities share. Recognizing traditional wireless providers often overlook the real needs of Hispanic and immigrant families, we created a culturally authentic, community-driven provider.

Qué Tal Móvil delivers transparent, affordable, and reliable wireless services with bilingual, personal support that strengthens family bonds, celebrates culture, and enriches everyday life. Guided by our mission to simplify lives, advance financial literacy, and boost community engagement, our vision is to become a trusted partner rooted in Hispanic culture.

At Qué Tal Móvil, every customer is familia. Beyond connecting phones, we connect hearts, homes, and aspirations—so you always feel close to what matters most.

Name: Telegent
Description:
Welcome to the future of mobile communication.

Telegent is the first-ever U.S.-based Artificially Intelligent Mobile Network (MVNX) — built to give both businesses and individuals more power, more flexibility, and more intelligence in how they use their phones.

We created the first mobile PBX—a smarter, mobile-first version of a traditional business phone system. Now, your entire office phone setup can live directly on your mobile device—no extra apps, no clunky hardware, just seamless communication wherever you are.

But Telegent is more than just mobile voice—it’s a complete platform that adds intelligence, automation, and flexibility to every call and message.

WHAT MAKES TELEGENT DIFFERENT:
A mobile network that’s actually smart—powered by AI to make calls, texts, and data work harder for you.
All the business phone features you need—like call routing, voicemail, extensions, and team messaging—built right into your phone.
No apps or extra downloads required.
Open APIs that let you connect Telegent with your existing tools and systems.
Designed to give you full control and transparency over your communications.

WHO WE WORK BEST WITH:
We’re a perfect fit for aggregators, operators, integrators, and tech enablers who want to deliver smarter, mobile-native communication experiences.

WHY IT MATTERS:
In a world where phones are smart, the networks behind them haven’t kept up. Telegent changes that. We turn mobile networks into intelligent, responsive platforms—making communication safer, faster, and smarter for everyone.

It’s time your mobile network caught up with your phone.

We partner with:
• Hyperscalers and AI infrastructure providers
• Data center developers and independent power producers
• Digital infrastructure operators and enterprise CIOs scaling critical workloads

Our focus is simple:
• Architect true physical diversity and resilience for AI-era traffic
• Shorten time-to-light with rapid-production, built-to-suit deployments
• Provide a responsive, engineering-led experience from initial route design through long-term operations

If you are building AI, data centers, or digital infrastructure that cannot afford downtime, HyperLink is the fiber partner engineered around your roadmap—not ours. Connect with us to explore custom routes, new markets, and what’s possible when your network is no longer the bottleneck.

Name: IPS, Inc.
Description:
IPS, Inc. is a Tokyo based Tokyo Stock Exchange-listed (TSE: 4390) telecommunications company with subsidiaries in Japan, the Philippines and Singapore where we are fully licensed to develop and operate telecom infrastructures. 

InfiniVAN, a Philippine affiliate of IPS, Inc., is one of the joint-build partners constructing the Philippine Domestic Submarine Cable Network (PDSCN). The other two partners are Eastern Telecommunications and Globe Telecom.

The PDSCN consists of 24 unrepeatered segments and has a total length of approximately 2,500kms -- the longest and newest domestic subsea cable system in the Philippines, connecting provinces in the Luzon, Visayas and Mindanao island groups. The roughly $150 million system is designed to have triple redundant routes in majority of the coverage areas in order to ensure network reliability and resiliency in a natural disaster-prone country.

The PDSCN is envisioned to be fully operational in April 2023. A portion called the "Express Route", which extends from the province of Quezon to the province of Cebu, has already been completed as of October 2022 and will be ready for service by the beginning of 2023. The PDSCN is expected to enhance the digitalization of the Philippines and lessen the digital divide in the country.  
 
With its own-built domestic terrestrial fiber optic network infrastructure as well as diverse IRU ownerships in multiple international submarine cable systems, infiniVAN has been at the forefront of increasing the ability of the country's dispersed service areas to be connected to the internet. It is the largest supplier of bulk internet bandwidth to the largest ISPs all over the country and boasts of 20+ Tbps of lit upstream capacity to the internet backbone. 

In the next 3 years, we are eyeing a significant regional expansion in Japan, the Philippines and international subsea areas.

Name: komro GmbH
Description:
komro - das kommunale Telekommunikationsunternehmen in Rosenheim wurde 1998 gegründet und bietet seinen heute über 25.000 Privat- und Geschäftskunden eine Vielzahl moderner Produkte in den Zukunftsmärkten Internet, Telefonie und TV-Entertainment.

Hervorgegangen ist die komro aus der ehemaligen „Stadtantenne Rosenheim“, einem Vorläufer heutiger Kabelnetze: Nach den Olympischen Spielen 1972 in München kaufte die Stadt Rosenheim Teile der Infrastruktur vom Fernsehnetz des Olympischen Dorfes.  Damit errichteten die Stadtwerke Rosenheim für eine Handvoll Kunden das erste Rosenheimer Kabelnetz für den Fernseh- und Radioempfang.

Aktuell bietet die komro Internetanschlüsse für Privatkunden mit bis zu 2 Gbit/s und Telefoniedienste über ein modernes Glasfaser- Kabelnetz flächendeckend im Stadtgebiet Rosenheim an.

Das Kabelfernsehprodukt „komroKabel TV“ wurde entsprechend den Kundenwünschen zusammengestellt. Es entstand eines der bundesweit umfangreichsten Pakete frei empfangbarer digitaler Fernsehsender, viele davon in HD – Qualität, einige bereits in UHD.

Standortvernetzungen und Internetanbindungen bis 10 Gbit/s, sowie zukunftsfähige virtuelle Telefonanlagen (Centrex und SIP-Trunk-Lösungen) ergänzen das Portfolio auch für mittlere und große Geschäftskunden.

Mit dem modernen Netz der komro gibt es in der Stadt Rosenheim eines der zukunftssichersten Breitbandnetze mit einem schon heute hohen Glasfaseranteil, der beständig erhöht wird. Bereits seit Jahren werden die Anschlüsse in Neubauten seitens komro konsequent mittels FTTB (fiber to the building – Glasfaser bis zum Gebäude) und FTTH (fiber to the home – Glasfaser bis in die Wohnung) realisiert.

komro Produkte gibt es in Rosenheim, Engelsberg und Penzberg, sowie in einigen Ortsbereichen von Stephanskirchen, Schechen, Raubling und Prutting. komro betreibt erfolgreich Kooperationen in Form von Beteiligungsgesellschaften in Bad Endorf (SternKom) und in Dachau (DachauCityCom).

Unser Portfolio – Der Nutzen für unsere Kunden.
Digitale Alarmierung und Meldeempfänger: Innovative und zuverlässige Lösungen für höchste Einsatzanforderungen.
Sirenen-Warnsysteme: Alles aus einer Hand – von der Planung, Schall-Simulation und dem Tiefbau bis hin zur Montage und Abnahme. Für dauerhafte Sicherheit übernehmen wir auch die regelmäßige Wartung Ihrer Systeme.
Navigationslösungen für Einsatzkräfte: Effiziente und einsatztaktisch optimierte Navigation mit direkter Integration in bestehende Kommunikationsstrukturen. Diese sind zugleich benutzerfreundlich als "Funkbedienung" zu nutzen.

Unsere Expertise: Ihre Sicherheit.  Die Sicherheit der Bürger und die Einsatzfähigkeit unserer Kunden stehen für uns an erster Stelle. Mit unserem umfassenden Service und einem überzeugenden Preis-Leistungs-Verhältnis garantieren wir komplette Lösungen, die exakt auf Ihre Bedürfnisse abgestimmt sind.

Besuchen Sie auch unsere Website und entdecken Sie, was wir für Sie tun können. Unser Team steht Ihnen jederzeit für Fragen und eine individuelle Beratung zur Verfügung.

Name: VoiceOTP
Description:
What is Voice OTP?

It is a two-factor authentication function that creates an OTP and uses text-to-speech technology to turn it into an audio message. It is employed to confirm consumer interactions with a company’s digital portals safely. It gets delivered via an automated call.
How Do Voice OTP Services Work?

A GSM call gets placed to the user’s phone number for voice OTP verification. The user inputs the 6-digit OTP in the application interface to authenticate a transaction or log in after picking up the phone to hear it played over the call.

Also Check: Why do People Prefer Voice OTPs over SMS OTP
How Are Voice OTP Services Better Than Text OTP Services?

    99% Delivery Rate

A failed transaction or verification will cost the company a thousand times more than an SMS would cost. Businesses can increase their delivery rates to 99% by employing voice OTP.

    Affordable

Both voice OTP services and SMS OTP services are equally affordable hence, a strategy that employs both simultaneously would reap a lot of benefits for your business. 

    Time Sensitive

Similar to the regular SMS OTP authentication capabilities, voice-based OTP serves as a two-factor authentication technique. It is an efficient and trustworthy notification system that ensures messages are delivered promptly and securely to customers’ mobile phones.

    Reliable 

There are more than 1 reason for of SMS transmission delays, including lack of location coverage and heavy network usage. Utilising voice technology for phone verification, voice OTP 2FA verification is incredibly speedy and trustworthy.
 Use Of Voice OTP Services For Business: 
1) Authorization
2) Reactivation
3) Authentication
4) Password Resets
Request
A voice OTP request can be made from either the system end or the user end. Similar to creating an account, a system can automatically deliver a voice OTP to the user for verification or at the user’s express request.
 Generate
When the request is received, the APIGenerate OTP

Description:
Galactic Telecom Group is a leading telecom startup company powered by cutting-edge telecommunications technology that takes mobile computing to new heights. 

We have recently introduced a revolutionary technology that converts WiFi Nodes into mobile terminals, wirelessly delivering broadband internet to homes and offices, and mobile devices stationed or in motion.  There is no need for paying technicians to run wires to home or office buildings.
 
Our state-of-the-art technology revolutionizes the telecommunications industry with a robust architecture that utilizes a chip-based modem, special routers, a network manager, and a plurality of protocols to network mobile devices in motion, on a WiFi network. 

The technology, cost-effectively provide unlimited broadband data to mobile devices, including phones, tablets, computers, sensors, navigation devices, and vehicles, all the time, thus eliminating the need for hotpots.

We are patented in more than 130 countries, and our internet protocols are additionally protected by copyright.  This technology sets new mobile communication and security standards. 

Much of the rural United States has no access to broadband because it is expensive for traditional networks to run wires to every home or office. We're changing that with our wireless delivery enabled by this service, which makes it easy to cover rural areas with broadband cost-effectively,

We are in the process of building a WiFi network focusing mostly on rural America and areas where it is expensive for traditional carriers to provide broadband.

If you're an investor, partner,  data/telecom network builder, colocation provider, we're looking for you. For more information or licensing details, please reach out to us at www.galactictelecomgroup.com/contact.  Or info@galactictelecomgroup.com

Name: Brighton Fibre
Description:
Brighton Fibre is an independent, hyperlocal broadband network built to challenge the way telecoms is done. We believe connectivity should be transparent, fair, and human — not about, long contracts, upsell, waiting on hold and treating customers like stock.

Our network has been built from the ground up in Brighton & Hove, reusing existing underground assets wherever possible and working closely with local authorities and communities. We make ourselves accessible and accountable, and we are the only provider to launch a genuine social tariff as a matter of principle, not as a sales tool.

Technically, the network is designed to be resilient and future-proof, with a city-wide underground fibre system, multihomed cores, and open standards at its foundation. We run our infrastructure with an adherence to open-source and API-driven principles, ensuring transparency and long-term sustainability.

Brighton Fibre exists to show that telecoms can be done differently: locally built, locally run, and rooted in the communities it serves.

Sobre Nós
Há uma década, a Xtreme tem sido a força motriz por trás da conectividade confiável em Manaus e na região circundante.  Para Residências e Empresas
Oferecemos uma variedade de planos de Internet de alta velocidade que atendem às necessidades tanto das famílias quanto das pequenas empresas. Nosso objetivo é tornar a Internet acessível e fácil de usar para todos, independentemente do tamanho da sua casa ou empresa.

 Compromisso com a Qualidade
Nossa paixão pela qualidade nos diferencia. Investimos em infraestrutura de ponta para garantir que nossos clientes desfrutem de uma experiência de Internet superior. A estabilidade e a velocidade são nossos pontos fortes.

 Local, mas Global
Embora estejamos enraizados em Manaus, nossa visão é global. A Internet conecta o mundo, e queremos que nossos clientes estejam prontos para fazer parte dessa conexão. Expandir nossos serviços e melhorar vidas é nossa busca constante.

 Clientes
Nossos clientes são a razão pela qual fazemos o que fazemos. Valorizamos a confiança que depositam em nós. Além disso, estamos comprometidos em entregar o melhor da conexão a internet conectar nossos clientes ao mundo.

Se você está em busca de uma conexão mais confiável ou deseja saber mais sobre nossos serviços, entre em contato conosco. Estamos aqui para você, Manaus!
